title: Timestamp-aware upsert for atomic increment
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.touch_last_login/1` that takes a user id. Update that user's `last_login_at` to now. Use `Repo.update_all/3` with `set:` for a direct UPDATE without loading the record. Pin `id` and `now`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical `update_all` + `set:` pattern with pinned id and timestamp. Requires knowing it bypasses changesets.
